UprightImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Knight of Wands card in an upright position.
UprightImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Knight of Wands card in a reversed position.

ReversedImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Knight of Wands card in an reversed position.
ReversedImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Knight of Wands card in a upright position.

records.Description: This card signifies a burgeoning opportunity related to material resources, finances, or career beginnings. It suggests a foundation being laid for stability and prosperity, but with a need for careful nurturing and grounded action. The path forward requires patience and a practical approach, focusing on building something solid from the ground up.  It speaks to potential and the power to manifest abundance through diligent effort.
Keywords: opportunity, foundation, prosperity, practicality, growth, potential, stability, manifestation
records.Advice: Invest time and effort wisely in building a secure future. Focus on practical steps and responsible financial management to realize your potential.
records.Affirmation:
I am building a strong foundation.
I attract abundance and prosperity.
My efforts yield fruitful results.

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Knight of Wands card in an upright position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Knight of Wands card in a reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the passion and determination of Lancelot as he charges forward on his black charger, driven by a quest that burns with the intensity of the desert's flames.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the danger or peril in this card. Instead, focus on the boldness and courage of Lancelot as he embarks on his passionate journey.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Knight of Wands card in an upright position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, harp, strings, flutes, percussion, energetic, uplifting, major, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Knight of Wands card in an reversed position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Knight of Wands card in a upright position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the reckless zeal of Don Quixote, his determination in the face of seemingly impossible odds.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the delusional aspect of Don Quixote's character. Instead, focus on his courage and passion.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Knight of Wands card in an reversed position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, brass, minor, melancholic, suspenseful, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Knight of Wands card in an between position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Knight of Wands card in a upright and reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the wild force, direction, and mischievous learning eyes of Sun Wukong as a symbol of unbridled energy, determination, and playful wisdom.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the obstacles on the desert path. Instead, focus on the Knight's ability to navigate through challenges with agility and spirit.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Knight of Wands card in an between position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, flutes, percussion, uplifting, energetic, major, instrumental
